caption: The video features a man sitting in a radio studio, engaged in what appears to be a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a black hoodie with the words "BOSS TALK" printed on it, a white cap, and headphones. The man is seated in front of a microphone, suggesting he is either hosting or participating in the show. Behind him, there is a banner with the text "Unique Hustle" and a sign that reads "Where Bosses Talk!" The setting includes various studio equipment, such as a computer monitor and a branded mug, indicating a professional yet casual atmosphere. The man seems focused and attentive, possibly listening to someone off-camera or preparing to speak.
